2605.03706.title: SAM-NER: Semantic Archetype Mediation for Zero-Shot Named Entity Recognition
2605.03706.paper_summary: Zero-shot Named Entity Recognition (ZS-NER) remains brittle under domain and schema shifts, where unseen label definitions often misalign with a large language model's (LLM's) intrinsic semantic organization. As a result, directly mapping entity mentions to fine-grained target labels can induce systematic semantic drift, especially when target schemas are novel or semantically overlapping. We propose \textbf{SAM-NER}, a three-stage framework based on \emph{Semantic Archetype Mediation} that stabilizes cross-domain transfer through an intermediate, domain-invariant archetype space. SAM-NER: (i) performs \emph{Entity Discovery} via cooperative extraction and consensus-based denoising to obtain high-coverage, high-fidelity entity spans; (ii) conducts \emph{Abstract Mediation} by projecting entities into a compact set of universal semantic archetypes distilled from high-level ontological abstractions; and (iii) applies \emph{Semantic Calibration} to resolve archetype-level predictions into target-domain types through constrained, definition-aligned inference with a frozen LLM. Experiments on the CrossNER benchmark show that SAM-NER consistently outperforms strong prior ZS-NER baselines in cross-domain settings. Our implementation will be open-sourced at https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/SAM-NER.
2605.03706.paper_summary_zh: 零-shot 命名實體識別 (ZS-NER) 在領域和架構變化下仍然脆弱，未見的標籤定義往往與大型語言模型 (LLM) 的內在語義組織不一致。<lb/>因此，直接將實體提及映射到細粒度目標標籤可能會引起系統性的語義漂移，特別是當目標架構是新穎或語義重疊的時候。<lb/>我們提出了 \textbf{SAM-NER}，這是一個基於 \emph{語義原型調解} 的三階段框架，通過中介的、領域不變的原型空間來穩定跨領域轉移。<lb/>SAM-NER: (i) 通過合作提取和基於共識的去噪進行 \emph{實體發現}，以獲得高覆蓋率和高保真度的實體範圍；<lb/>(ii) 通過將實體投影到從高層次本體抽象中提煉出的緊湊的普遍語義原型集來進行 \emph{抽象調解}；<lb/>(iii) 應用 \emph{語義校準}，通過與凍結的 LLM 進行約束的、與定義對齊的推斷，將原型級預測解析為目標領域類型。<lb/>在 CrossNER 基準上的實驗顯示，SAM-NER 在跨領域設置中始終超越強大的先前 ZS-NER 基線。<lb/>我們的實現將在 https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/SAM-NER 開源。
2605.03706.author: Ruichu Cai et.al.
2605.03706.authors: Ruichu Cai, Juntao Gan, Miao Mai, Zhifeng Hao, Boyan Xu
